overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a misty temperate forest. The character travels along a dirt path passing under a large hollow fallen tree and emerging into an area with distant mountain views.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily along a narrow dirt path surrounded by tall pine trees and rocky outcrops, with two swords strapped to his back

entered.detail: Dense forest of tall evergreen conifers forming the backdrop
Mixed grass and low vegetation covering the forest floor
Large moss-covered boulders scattered along the hillside
Sparse shrubs and undergrowth along the trail edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking through a misty pine forest. The path winds through dense vegetation with rocky outcrops visible on the right. The atmosphere is calm and exploratory, with soft morning light filtering through the tree canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail passing under fallen tree archway

events.description: character approaches and passes underneath a massive hollow fallen tree trunk forming a natural arch over the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking forward and passes under the large hollow log archway, navigating the shaded area beneath

entered.detail: Massive fallen tree trunk with hollow center forming a natural tunnel over the path

segments.scene_description: As Geralt progresses, he approaches a distinctive hollow fallen tree that forms a natural arch over the trail. He passes underneath this formation, with the camera capturing the textured bark and the dappled light filtering through. The surrounding pines shift to frame the sides of the view as the character moves through this landmark.

events.description: distant snow-capped mountains become visible through the trees on the left horizon

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along the widening forest path with snow-capped mountains now visible in the distance ahead

entered.detail: Snow-capped mountain peaks visible through gaps in the forest canopy
Clusters of red flowers blooming among the grass on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: After passing the hollow log, the forest opens up to reveal a stunning view of distant snow-capped mountains on the left. The path continues through grassland with scattered pines and patches of red wildflowers. The lighting becomes brighter as the canopy opens, creating a picturesque mountain vista scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty pine forest that gradually opens into a bright, expansive mountain vista. It begins with Geralt walking along a winding dirt path through dense vegetation and rocky outcrops under soft, filtered morning light. As he progresses, the camera follows him beneath a large, hollow fallen tree that forms a natural arch, capturing the textured bark and dappled light as the pines frame the trail. The scene then expands as the canopy thins, shifting from the enclosed woods to open grasslands dotted with red wildflowers. Finally, the view opens wide to reveal a stunning panorama of distant snow-capped mountains under a brightening sky.
